reason: Review against backend checklist for core and Docker runtime changes.
Verify row-level backpack and expiring budget behavior matches the documented contract or intentional PRD override.
Verify Douyu send and status failures keep explicit, actionable semantics.
Verify release logs are user-visible, structured, and secret-safe.
Run/review required lint, type-check, and Docker build quality gates.
Verify WebUI edits stay in the Docker WebUI and avoid legacy frontend paths.
Check the implementation reused existing helpers and centralized constants.
Check core selection, send jobs, status API data, and WebUI row status remain consistent.
